changeSet.author: nexus-ykzbj.8
changeSet.comment: SELECT-only grants for the nexus_diag diagnostic role (RDR-182 P2.1). Conditional on the role existing (clean skip otherwise; self-heals every startup via runAlways). ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES runs as this migration connection's role (nexus_admin — the creator of every schema table), so future tables are covered automatically. Read-only by construction: SELECT on tables plus the Liquibase journal; deliberately NO sequence usage, NO DML, NO EXECUTE on the soft-delete functions.
